strategy: Hit Fire or Death, each +30%, and never Life, which he resists 80%; prism if you are Life.
Clear the all-Wizard Weakness, refreshed every third Round, with a Cleanse Charm the Round before you hit so your damage is not reduced.
He is stunable, so a stun buys a clean setup or hit Round.
Kill the Brume Goblin with your AoE, or blade up and drop one Fire or Death hit on the boss.
cheatNotes: Every Wizard starts with a Weakness, refreshed every third Round, cutting your damage. Cleanse it before you hit.
The Weakness only applies while the boss is alive, and he does not cast it himself, so a Cleanse Charm right before your hit lands clean.
